body: The method in Reactant extension for `materialize_immersed_boundary` only works for a `GridFittedBottom` immersed boundary argument. It has inconsistencies with the base method for this argument, and doesn't appear to be necessary.
title: Removing Reactant extension method for materialize_immersed_boundary

body: This PR cleans up the benchmark scripts that could be misleading. cc #4786
title: Remove misleading benchmark scripts
